description:
Advances: specled.branch_guard, specled.realized_by, specled.binding

Distilled from /mega-plan via /distill on 2026-05-12.

Plan: /Users/mz/.claude-personal/plans/do-a-mega-plan-iridescent-bunny.md
Spec: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/plans/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/2026-05-12-relax-branch-check-on-realization-green/00-spec.md
Decision: .spec/decisions/specled.decision.file_touch_yields_to_realization.md
Branch: feature/file-touch-yields-to-realization

When realization attests a (file, subject) pair as clean for the current run, downgrade the file-touch finding (branch_guard_missing_subject_update) from :error to :info with a distinctive message naming the attesting bindings. File-level grain, per-subject independence, user severity config still wins, detector failure falls back to strict. Same finding code, different severity and message.

Subject specs advanced by this epic:
- specled.branch_guard (5 new requirements)
- specled.realized_by (2 new requirements)
- specled.binding (3 new requirements)

comments.text:
ORCHESTRATED
Children closed: 4
BOUNCEs encountered: 0
User escalations: 0

Notes:
- .spec/state.json was regenerated by mix spec.check on each stage and counted as "Files outside Allowed globs: 1" by verifiers on 3rs.1–3rs.3. Auditors approved as benign tooling artifact each time.
- mix spec.check exits 1 on the epic branch with 5 pre-existing findings: 4 overlap/duplicate_covers from the epic distill commit (a8b2383) and 1 branch_guard_missing_subject_update against specled.append_only/specled.severity (architectural — tagged_tests expansion only triggers on requirement-level realized_by). Auditor adjudicated these as pre-existing; zero new findings introduced by the 4 stages.
- mix format --check-formatted has 61 pre-existing unformatted files on the epic branch; no stage introduced new ones (3rs.4 reduced the count by 2).
- Test suite (802 tests) passes cleanly with GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null; without it, 1Password ssh-agent signing causes test timeouts. This is a local environment issue unrelated to the code changes.
- Follow-up tickets recommended: (1) overlap/duplicate_covers cleanup in binding.spec.md and realized_by.spec.md, (2) extend tagged_tests attestation expansion to subject-level realized_by bindings.

title: Relax branch_check file-touch guard when realization attests
